summary: iter_004: Two-Phase compiler with centralized type registry. FPC=1.0 (22/22). Phase 1 extracted 468 types. Phase 2 generated 22 BSV modules. ZFPR=1.0 on 3/22 functionally-tested modules, 19/22 compile-only verified.
key_findings: Phase 1 type registry successfully extracted 468 type definitions (202 numeric, 59 bit, 46 enums, 96 structs, 65 interfaces)
Phase 2 YAML→BSV pipeline verified at scale: all 22 modules compile
ID ratio 1.015 for L4 approach, degraded from 0.43 for L2-L3 approach (iter_002)
19/22 modules lack functional testbenches — ZFPR measured on only 3 modules
Module compilation time varies: T01-T03 <5s, complex modules (PayloadGen, TransportLayer) 60-120s
next_direction_hints: Create standalone functional testbenches for T04-T09 to expand ZFPR coverage
Move T04-T09 YAML from L4 → L3 (pseudocode) to improve ID ratio
Experiment with different Phase 2 generation strategies (bottom-up vs parallel)
